form.formComment: Last start was driven from back in the field when 4th (Fr6) over 2690m at Kilmore, beaten 25 m by Lazenby (3:31.10) in 4yo+ MAIDEN on March 26 at $101. Two runs back 10th (Fr3) over 1690m at Kilmore beaten 30 m by Blazin By (2:05.10) in 0-1 WIN on December 11 at $151. Strips fitter now and is a solid top-three chance.

Not keen.
